meaning: 拉特兰郡[英国英格兰原郡名]
examples: I wish I knew what she and Rutland are up to.
You must find this a big change from the navy, Mr Rutland.
David Lewis, Rutland Telecom's boss, says that figure is far too high.
Sleepwell Hotels operates The Rutland, the Claremont and the Chesterhouse Hotels - all on Douglas promenade.
Councils in Leicester, Leicestershire and Rutland wrote to Mr Hunt earlier this month opposing the move.
